knowledge: 如果价格跌到40美元，你会退出交易，因为触及了移动止损（计算：50美元 x 0.8 = 40美元）。
original: 你在50美元买入一只股票，设置20%的移动止损。 - 如果价格跌到40美元，你会退出交易，因为触及了移动止损（计算：50美元 x 0.8 = 40美元）。 - 但如果价格涨到60美元，你的移动止损会调整到48美元（计算：60美元 x 0.8 = 48美元）。 - 现在，如果价格飙升至200美元并触及你的移动止损（在160美元），你就抓住了一波大行情。
source_path: ❷ 推文合集（2026年） ｜ 中文.md

knowledge: 现在回想起来，我应该把风险分散到不同市场，比如布伦特原油、期权、ETF等，而不是全押在WTI上。这样做的话，我的投资本来可以轻松赚到3倍收益。
original: 现在回想起来，我应该把风险分散到不同市场，比如布伦特原油、期权、ETF等，而不是全押在WTI上。这样做的话，我的投资本来可以轻松赚到3倍收益。

knowledge: 关键在于：趋势不会同时出现在所有地方。通过交易多个市场，你就像在不同资产类别中分散了“彩票”——好比同时使用多个约会软件，而不是只有一个。

knowledge: 在这种时候，你必须屏蔽噪音，控制情绪，遵守规则。如果你能做到，当年就能获得67%的收益。这就是系统化交易的力量，因为它消除了猜测，避免了情绪化决策（这类决策通常结果不佳）。

knowledge: 与大多数与股市相关的交易系统不同，趋势跟踪与股市不相关。这让你在危机期间得到保护，并为你的投资组合提供更好的风险调整后回报。
original: 与大多数与股市相关的交易系统不同，趋势跟踪与股市不相关。这让你在危机期间得到保护，并为你的投资组合提供更好的风险调整后回报。
source_path: ❷ 推文合集（2026年） ｜ 中文.md

knowledge: 然而，对于趋势跟踪，你可能会经历长达数年的回撤期，这使得这套交易系统在心理上难以执行。毕竟，谁喜欢频繁亏损，并且多年看不到成果呢？
original: 然而，对于趋势跟踪，你可能会经历长达数年的回撤期，这使得这套交易系统在心理上难以执行。毕竟，谁喜欢频繁亏损，并且多年看不到成果呢？

knowledge: 最后，纪律。我把纪律放在最后，因为大多数纪律问题源于没有交易优势或适当的风险管理。

source_path: ❷ 推文合集（2026年） ｜ 中文.md

knowledge: If you can do it, you’d be up 67% for the year.
original: In times like this, you must tune out the noise, control your emotions, and follow the rules. If you can do it, you’d be up 67% for the year. That’s the power of systems trading because you remove the guesswork and avoid making emotional decisions (which rarely end well).
source_path: ❷ 推文合集（2026年） ｜ 英文.md

knowledge: But if you can embrace that, the rewards are worth it because you get exposure to the strongest stocks (the Usain Bolts of the market), outsized returns, and minimal time commitment.
original: Of course, no trading system is perfect. Momentum comes with volatility and drawdowns, and it requires the discipline to keep buying when it feels uncomfortable. But if you can embrace that, the rewards are worth it because you get exposure to the strongest stocks (the Usain Bolts of the market), outsized returns, and minimal time commitment.
source_path: ❷ 推文合集（2026年） ｜ 英文.md

knowledge: And because you are trading with an objective set of rules, you can backtest this Trend Following system and see how it has performed.
original: Of course, this is a cherry-picked example. And because you are trading with an objective set of rules, you can backtest this Trend Following system and see how it has performed.

knowledge: I recalled that during March 2020, the stock market tanked 30% because of COVID.
original: I recalled that during March 2020, the stock market tanked 30% because of COVID. Shortly, it bottomed out, and the stock market climbed up towards the all-time high. At this point, can you imagine having to buy stocks when the financial news is filled with negativity?
source_path: ❷ 推文合集（2026年） ｜ 英文.md

knowledge: A trading system goes long when the stock price makes a 5-day low.
original: E.g. A trading system goes long when the stock price makes a 5-day low. What if you test the 10, 20 or even 50-day low? What’s the impact of it? Are the risk-adjusted returns getting better when the duration is increased, or does it perform worse?
source_path: ❷ 推文合集（2026年） ｜ 英文.md

knowledge: You can’t follow the rules of your trading system because you lost too much and need to make it all back on the next trade (no risk management)
original: You can’t follow the rules of your trading system because you lost too much and need to make it all back on the next trade (no risk management)
source_path: ❷ 推文合集（2026年） ｜ 英文.md

knowledge: • Sell when the price closes below the 200-day moving average.
original: • Buy when the 50MA crosses above the 200MA. • Sell when the price closes below the 200-day moving average. • Risk 1% on each trade. • Retire to your private island.
source_path: ❷ 推文合集（2026年） ｜ 英文.md

knowledge: If the market doesn’t recover, you can expect to suffer a drawdown of 40 or even 50%.
original: You only trade once per month (on the 1st trading day of each month). This means if the market makes a sudden decline during the month, you still have to hold your positions. If the market doesn’t recover, you can expect to suffer a drawdown of 40 or even 50%.
source_path: ❷ 推文合集（2026年） ｜ 英文.md

knowledge: When a company posts great earnings, the stock could jump 10% in a day.
original: When a company posts great earnings, the stock could jump 10% in a day. Over the next few days, analysts upgrade the stock to a “Strong Buy” (which is analyst speak for “We totally missed this but will pretend we knew all along”). This brings in more capital from institutions and retail players and thus pushes the price even higher.
source_path: ❷ 推文合集（2026年） ｜ 英文.md

knowledge: Now, before I give you the rules of a Trend Following system that works, you first need to understand the principles behind it so you can make it work for you.
original: Now, before I give you the rules of a Trend Following system that works, you first need to understand the principles behind it so you can make it work for you.
source_path: ❷ 推文合集（2026年） ｜ 英文.md

knowledge: When you trade multiple trading systems that have little to no correlation, you will improve your risk-adjusted returns, reduce your maximum drawdown, and have a smoother equity curve.
original: When you trade multiple trading systems that have little to no correlation, you will improve your risk-adjusted returns, reduce your maximum drawdown, and have a smoother equity curve.
source_path: ❷ 推文合集（2026年） ｜ 英文.md

knowledge: For example, a systems trader might have a rule like this: if a stock drops three days in a row, buy.
original: For example, a systems trader might have a rule like this: if a stock drops three days in a row, buy. Then sell when it closes above the 5-day moving average.
source_path: ❷ 推文合集（2026年） ｜ 英文.md

knowledge: Cognitive load happens when you scan the markets for trading setups and decide if a setup is valid or not.
original: Cognitive load happens when you scan the markets for trading setups and decide if a setup is valid or not. The more markets you trade, the higher the cognitive load. And the higher the load, the more mistakes you’ll make.
source_path: ❷ 推文合集（2026年） ｜ 英文.md

knowledge: That’s why it’s important to cut your losses so you can live to fight another day—unlike my hairline, which fought the good fight but has now given up.
original: Even though you trade many markets, you’ll still face frequent losses because most of these trades fail to develop into a trend. That’s why it’s important to cut your losses so you can live to fight another day—unlike my hairline, which fought the good fight but has now given up.
source_path: ❷ 推文合集（2026年） ｜ 英文.md

knowledge: Looking back, I should have spread the risk across different markets like Brent crude oil, options, ETFs, etc., not all on WTI.
original: Looking back, I should have spread the risk across different markets like Brent crude oil, options, ETFs, etc., not all on WTI. Doing this would have easily made a 3x on my investment.
source_path: ❷ 推文合集（2026年） ｜ 英文.md

knowledge: Most stock trading systems go into a deep drawdown because they are going against the overall market trend.
original: Most stock trading systems go into a deep drawdown because they are going against the overall market trend. So by having a trend filter, you can reduce the maximum drawdown.

knowledge: For example, if Tesla went from $100 to $200, then the ROC value is 100 because it went up 100% during the period.

knowledge: Unlike investors who have to analyse financial reports and follow the news so they can be exposed to the best performing stocks, a momentum trading system allows you to automatically get exposure to them without any of t...
original: Unlike investors who have to analyse financial reports and follow the news so they can be exposed to the best performing stocks, a momentum trading system allows you to automatically get exposure to them without any of that “work”. That’s because you use price as the signal to tell you what’s hot and what’s not.

knowledge: Trend Following works best when you trade many different markets because it increases the odds of capturing a trend.
original: Trend Following works best when you trade many different markets because it increases the odds of capturing a trend.

knowledge: Like that friend who rarely calls but always brings expensive whiskey when they visit.
original: A trend following approach has a lower winning rate, but the average profit is larger than the average loss. Like that friend who rarely calls but always brings expensive whiskey when they visit.

knowledge: Because there’s a fear in you, the fear that you might get burned alive.

Because there’s a fear in you, the fear that you might get burned alive. And guess what? Everyone else has the same fear as you, otherwise known as the herd mentality.

knowledge: Thus, a momentum trading strategy looks to buy when the price is high, with the hopes of selling it at an even higher price (buy high and sell higher).
original: The idea behind momentum trading is simple: an asset price that has momentum tends to continue moving in that direction. Thus, a momentum trading strategy looks to buy when the price is high, with the hopes of selling it at an even higher price (buy high and sell higher).

knowledge: That’s why, as a trader, you shouldn’t allocate all your capital to a single stock because anything could happen.
original: Anything can happen to a stock price. For all you know, the company is fraudulent, and the stock price goes to zero. That’s why, as a trader, you shouldn’t allocate all your capital to a single stock because anything could happen.
